creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Grab your loved one and take them to the cool spots @voco_monacodubai at The World Islands! 💙

Voco Monaco is an adults only party resort. It has a pristine white sand beach, a street where it rains 24/7, lovely restaurants, and very welcoming staff! It also has epic foam parties, but the main pool was under renovation during our stay so we didn’t get to experience it. At least, we have a reason to go back. 🤗

⛴️ To get there: Ride the resort’s private boat from Dubai Canal Marine Station. You’ll get to enjoy scenic views of Dubai skyline and undeveloped islands along the way. Boat transfer is free for hotel guests. You need to book your seat ahead through a link that will be given upon confirming your hotel reservation. 

Who will you bring here? Tag them in the comments. 

The World Islands • Dubai Hotel • My Dubai • Dubai Destinations • Lady and her Sweet Escapes

transcription.text: You will be my girl, my girl, my girl, my girl
